initiatives.name: NJ Trans Queer Defense
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective organizing direct support and community defense for trans and queer people across New Jersey. They coordinate resource sharing, solidarity networks, and community care while building power through direct action, peer support, and creating affirming spaces for trans and queer liberation.

initiatives.name: Say Gay NJ
initiatives.description: A grassroots mutual aid collective organizing support and community defense for LGBTQ+ youth across New Jersey. They coordinate resource sharing, solidarity networks, and direct assistance while building community power through youth organizing, education advocacy, and creating affirming spaces for queer and trans youth.

initiatives.name: Books Behind Bars
initiatives.description: A volunteer-run prison abolition project providing free books to people incarcerated in New Jersey. They coordinate direct support through book requests and distribution while building networks of solidarity through literacy access, educational empowerment, and challenging mass incarceration. Based in Wildwood, they are the first and only books-to-prison program in New Jersey.

initiatives.name: New Jersey Harm Reduction Coalition
initiatives.description: A mutual aid network providing free harm reduction supplies and support across New Jersey. They coordinate direct assistance through naloxone distribution, syringe access, and safer use supplies while building community power through evidence-informed public health resources, education, and advocacy to promote the safety and dignity of people who use drugs.

initiatives.name: NJ Peace and Justice Works
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization building mutual aid networks and solidarity through peace and justice initiatives across New Jersey. They coordinate direct support, community organizing, and resource sharing while building power through education and collective action.

initiatives.name: Ida's Books
initiatives.description: A community-focused bookstore and mutual aid initiative providing access to literature and educational resources while building solidarity networks across New Jersey.

initiatives.name: New Jersey Red Umbrella Alliance
initiatives.description: The New Jersey Red Umbrella Alliance (NJRUA) is a working alliance of activists and allies who are dedicated to promoting, defending, and advocating for the human rights of sex workers in the state of New Jersey.

initiatives.name: New Jersey Abortion Access Fund
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization providing mutual aid and support for abortion access across New Jersey. They coordinate direct financial assistance, practical support, and solidarity networks while building power through reproductive justice organizing and creating pathways for healthcare access and bodily autonomy.

initiatives.name: Mutual Aid Morris
initiatives.description: Mutual aid and community building in Morris County, NJ

initiatives.name: Cosecha NJ
initiatives.description: Fighting for Respect, Dignity and Permanent Protection for all.

initiatives.name: NJ Burn
initiatives.description: New Jersey youth-led organization working to build sustained political struggle in our neighborhoods.
